objective: Attempt live acquisition of a higher-quality MARKET label source from available provider credentials, while preventing unapproved candidate data from being written as the official source.
forbidden: Do not print or persist credentials.
Do not write data_raw/market_labels/market_total_return_index.csv unless all gates pass and allow_target_write=true.
Do not treat JoinQuant get_price output as certified total-return evidence.
Do not generate labels, performance, NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, or portfolio-return outputs.
Do not promote any candidate into a model.
acceptance_criteria: Provider readiness and live attempt result are recorded.
Candidate source rows are quality-checked against the V3.53/V3.73 contract.
Signal-date coverage is checked for all configured horizons.
If the candidate is short-history or unapproved, target source write is blocked.
Manual data/API requirements are written if acquisition cannot produce a compliant source.
failure_conditions: The official target source is written while write_allowed=false.
Any price-only or unapproved adjusted proxy is claimed as certified total return.
Any portfolio or model-promotion artifact is generated.
quality_gates: agent_run_manifest.json satisfies the manifest required field schema.
Forbidden performance or promotion output scan returns zero hits.
Secret leak scan returns zero paths.
next_handoff: If V3.74 cannot produce a compliant source, user or data vendor must provide the total-return/adjusted-market CSV contract before V3.53 can be rerun.
